constraints.criteria: foundational/high-influence within corpus themes on LLM agents and LLM evaluation

normalized_question: Recommend foundational papers from the 30-paper LLM-agents-and-evaluation corpus, grouped by theme (surveys, agent benchmarks, methodology/frameworks, social-cognition/reasoning evaluations), grounded in corpus titles and themes.

obligations.description: Identify the most foundational evaluation/survey papers that anchor the corpus (LLM evaluation, agent evaluation, multimodal evaluation, hallucination, conversation analysis) and briefly state why each is a foundational pick.
